steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The opening phrase says something was initially overlooked as insignificant research. The noun immediately after the comma must therefore be research, not a person or the antibodies themselves.

steps.title: Choose the research subject
steps.content: Choice A makes Milstein the thing overlooked as research. Choice B does the same after an introductory phrase. Choice D makes monoclonal antibodies, not the study, the subject. The subject that can logically be overlooked as research is Milstein's study. The answer is C.
